capability.name: Token Optimization
capability.description: Accomplish goals with fewer tool calls and less context usage. Recognize when you're being inefficient and course-correct.

sets.goal: Find which file in the project defines a function called 'processPayment'
sets.inefficient_plan:
1. List all directories
2. List files in src/
3. List files in src/utils/
4. List files in src/services/
5. Read src/services/payment.ts
6. Read src/services/billing.ts
7. Read src/services/checkout.ts

sets.goal: Count how many TypeScript files exist in the project
sets.inefficient_plan:
1. List root directory
2. List src/
3. List src/components/
4. List src/utils/
5. List src/pages/
6. Count .ts files in each listing manually

sets.goal: Find all files that import from '@utils/logger' and check if they handle errors
sets.inefficient_plan:
1. Search for '@utils/logger' in file 1
2. Search for '@utils/logger' in file 2
3. Search for '@utils/logger' in file 3
... (repeat for each file)
10. Read each matching file individually

criteria.description: Used efficient tools (search/glob vs manual listing)
Explained why the original was inefficient

parameters.name: task
values: Analyze 20 log files (each ~500 lines) to find the root cause of a recurring error
Review a 3000-line source file to identify all security vulnerabilities
Compare two large JSON configuration files (each ~1000 lines) and list differences

steps.3: Compare two large JSON configuration files (each ~1000 lines) and list differences
steps.4: Review a 3000-line source file to identify all security vulnerabilities
steps.5: Analyze 20 log files (each ~500 lines) to find the root cause of a recurring error

criteria.description: Strategy avoids reading everything at once
Has a structured approach with clear steps
